id.description: Unique identifier for the service request

status.description: FHIR status of the service request

intent.description: FHIR intent of the service request

code.description: Code identifying the specific service or procedure requested

task_business_status.description: Task business status for workflow tracking (e.g., 'Specimen collected', 'Results pending')

task_description.description: Task description - free text explanation of what needs to be performed
